chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Narrations Regarding Tawaf.

text: 2844 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ سَهَا أَنْ يَطُوفَ بِالْبَيْتِ حَتَّى يَرْجِعَ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ فَقَالَ «إِذَا كَانَ عَلَى وَجْهِ اَلْجَهَالَةِ أَعَادَ اَلْحَجَّ وَ عَلَيْهِ بَدَنَةٌ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2844 - Ali ibn Abi Hamza narrated from Imam Abu al-Hasan (as):
He was asked about a man who forgot to perform the circumambulation around the Kaaba (Tawaf) until he returned to his family.
Imam (as) replied: "If it was out of ignorance, he must repeat the Hajj and offer a sacrifice of a camel."
